curl -X PUT "https://pix-h.api.efipay.com.br/v2/webhook/7e6efb1f-69eb-4919-a9de-64f46589cf6c" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..3bv0EpbeCRivKmxnplHXmDZ3zyhB-FeEGFTTsg5hJ5o" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --cert-type P12 \
  --cert /opt/rateio_top_mvp/certs/certificado.p12 \
  -d '{
    "webhookUrl": "https://api.rateio.top/api/webhook/efipay"
  }'
